title: Luna 6 Frontal Collisions细项：Pedestrian与Bicyclist场景得分
content: Pedestrian & Cyclist场景中：Car-to-Pedestrian Longitudinal均为2.3959/2.5，Turning均为1.6563/2.5，Crossing由4.4024/5升至4.4371/5；Car-to-Bicyclist Longitudinal均为2.3959/2.5，Turning由1.5938/2.5升至1.6563/2.5，Crossing由4.575/5升至4.6/5。相比车车/车摩场景，VRU场景提升幅度较小。
